items.title: Constellation Closes Deal for Calpine, Creating Biggest Electricity Generator
items.description: The closure is a big step for Constellation, which first announced the deal almost exactly a year ago.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Slips Back Below 49K; Trump Takes On Defense Firms (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index dipped in mixed trade Wednesday after surprise jobs data. Bitcoin stock Strategy jumped.

items.title: Productivity needed from AI to justify high valuations, expert says
items.description: STORY: Shares of Nvidia, Microsoft and Alphabet ended higher on Wednesday as investors shifted back into AI stocks following recent worries they were overvalued.But going into 2026, Browne said he would like to see "tangible gains in productivity [from AI]" that would help "justify some of the current valuations."But "if we don't see that," cautioned Browne, "then we think markets may start to pay more and more attention to the rich valuations that are out there and ask themselves, 'is this all making sense?'"

items.title: Alphabet Surpasses Apple in Market Cap for First Time Since 2019
items.description: FEATURE  So long, Apple There’s a new No. 2 in the market-capitalization rankings.   Alphabet surpassed Apple in market cap on Wednesday, making the Google parent the world’s second-largest U.S. company behind only Nvidia  Alphabet shares closed up 2.

items.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Mom Predicted It, His Sister Bet On It: The Story Behind Meta CEO's Harvard Dropout
items.description: Mark Zuckerberg's famous 2004 Harvard dropout—expected by his family and friends—stemmed from his Facemash experiment and led directly to Facebook's creation, later bringing him back to campus as a billionaire Meta CEO following a path shared by other tech giants.
